Migrated the app fully to the App Router and removed `pages/` entirely. The old Pages Router APIs were replaced with App Router equivalents: `_app` and `_document` became [app/layout.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx), `Head` became typed `metadata`/`generateMetadata`, `getServerSideProps` became an async dynamic server page in [app/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx), `getStaticProps`/`getStaticPaths` became `revalidate` and `generateStaticParams` in [app/blog/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx) and [app/blog/[id]/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx), `404.js` became [app/not-found.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx), and `_error.js` became [app/error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx) plus [app/global-error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/global-error.tsx).

The API routes were migrated from `pages/api` to typed route handlers in [app/api/posts/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts) and [app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts), using `NextResponse` and typed `params`. I also converted shared client code to TypeScript in [components/AppProvider.tsx](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx), added a typed client back button in [components/BackButton.tsx](/home/user/workspace/components/BackButton.tsx), and centralized data types/helpers in [lib/types.ts](/home/user/workspace/lib/types.ts) and [lib/blog-api.ts](/home/user/workspace/lib/blog-api.ts). `tsconfig.json` was auto-updated by Next during build to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts`.

Verification: `npm run build` completed successfully on July 15, 2026, and the final routes are App Router-only.
